description: Your organization's compliance team is preparing for an external security audit and needs structured user authentication data from the SIEM. Using Splunk (http://localhost:8000, admin/SplunkAdmin1!), develop a lookup-based audit capability using the security_logs index. Create a lookup table populated with statistics for the top 5 most active users, configure a lookup definition, and provide a saved report that uses the lookup to produce a structured view of user authentication activity.
